markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Nico O'Reilly records at least 2 assists during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the England vs Congo DR professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 1, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the England vs Congo DR professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 1, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's assists recorded.
markets.title: Nico O'Reilly: 2+ assists?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If no player records the first goal during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the England vs Congo DR professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 1, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the England vs Congo DR professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 1, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored. If the first goal of the match is an own goal, the market will resolve based on the next non-own-goal scored.
markets.title: No Goal: First Goalscorer

Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored. If the first goal of the match is an own goal, the market will resolve based on the next non-own-goal scored.
markets.title: Noah Sadiki: First Goalscorer

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Ngal'ayel Mukau records the first goal during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the England vs Congo DR professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 1, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
